title: player tick freezer
description: freezes survival players too when you do /tick freeze, not creative or spectators
body:
This mod freezes the player when they are in survival mode and when the /tick freeze is enabled. useful for.. uhhh.. idk. whatever, this is just a test I did for a future mod I want to make.

Also the mod icon is a sneakpeek for the mod that im trying to make ;)

DISCLAIMER:
Its not required for the client but without it, its gonna be really weird so its like kinda required for server and client.


Join the Discord! where this mod was even requested! You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code)

Or donate to my Kofi incase you are feeling generous!
